headline: Morgan Stanley Raises Philip Morris (PM) Target on Confidence in Zyn and IQOS Growth
summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) is included among the 10 No-Brainer Dividend Stocks to Buy. On June 3, Morgan Stanley raised its price recommendation on Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) to $200 from $190. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said its confidence improved following updates shared by Philip Morris at […]

headline: Altria and Philip Morris Are Both Dividend Giants, But Barchart Data Shows 1 Stock Is a Much Stronger Buy Here
summary: Altria and Philip Morris may look similar, but their dividends, markets, valuations, and smoke-free strategies tell a very different story.

headline: What Philip Morris International (PM)'s EPS Cut and Canada Impairment Means For Shareholders
summary: Earlier this week, Philip Morris International updated its 2026 full-year reported diluted EPS guidance to US$7.18–US$7.33 after recognizing an expected US$500 million non-cash impairment tied to its Canadian affiliate Rothmans, Benson & Hedges and currency effects. While this impairment reflects weaker prospects for the Canadian unit, management continues to highlight smoke-free products as the main driver of the group’s underlying performance. We’ll now examine how the earnings guidance...
